title: The Most Important UFO Investigator On The Planet (ft. James Fox)
summary: James Fox discusses his decades-long career investigating UFOs, including his documentary work, the 1996 Varginha Brazil incident involving alleged alien creatures, the Holloman Air Force Base landing case, and his methods for getting reluctant witnesses to come forward. The interview covers government UFO programs, crash retrievals, and the challenges of UFO research.

acronyms.definition: US intelligence agency that conducted parallel UFO investigations separate from Project Blue Book
Alleged secret committee of scientists and military officials created by President Truman to study UFOs

events.description: Robertson Panel established policy of ridiculing UFO reports
UFO landing case in Socorro, New Mexico involving police officer Lonnie Zamora
Jacques Vallee met with Dr. Hynek at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base
Westall UFO landing case in Australia with multiple school children witnesses
Ariel School UFO landing in Ruwa, Zimbabwe with 66 school children witnesses
Nellis Range UFO incident captured on video
Varginha, Brazil UFO incident with alleged alien creatures and military involvement

key_claims.claim: A classified document revealed a parallel, well-funded UFO investigation program running alongside Project Blue Book
The Robertson Panel in 1953 adopted a classified policy of systematically ridiculing UFO reports through media
Robert Oppenheimer was allegedly part of the Aztec crash retrieval team according to William Steinman's book
Allan Sandler claims to have seen footage of a UFO landing at Holloman Air Force Base showing three beings exiting the craft
Paul Shartle, who showed the Holloman footage to Allan Sandler, later died in a head-on collision
A military officer named Marco de Souza handled an alien being in Varginha and later died from apparent exposure effects
The beings at Varginha emitted a strong sulfuric odor that persisted for weeks in the hospital wing
The alien body from Varginha was reportedly transported to the United States
Footage exists of the Varginha incident showing military transport of an alien being
